ketchup.example: He put ketchup on his fries.

kilogram.example: The bag of rice weighs five kilograms.

lack.example: The plant died from a lack of water.
lack.example_zh: 這株植物因缺水而枯死。

lady.example: A kind lady helped me find the way.
lady.example_zh: 一位親切的女士幫我指路。

ladybug.example: A ladybug landed on the leaf.

lamb.example: The little lamb followed its mother.
We had roast lamb for dinner.

lane.example: Cars must stay in their own lane.
lane.example_zh: 車輛必須行駛在自己的車道上。

lane.example: They live in a quiet lane.
lane.example_zh: 他們住在一條安靜的巷子裡。

lantern.example: We hung lanterns for the festival.

lap.example: The runner finished the final lap.
The cat sat on her lap.

latest.example: Have you heard the latest news?

latter.example: Of the two choices, I prefer the latter.
latter.example_zh: 兩個選擇中，我比較喜歡後者。

latter.example: It rained in the latter part of the day.

law.example_zh: 每個人都必須遵守法律。

law.example: He studied the laws of physics.

lay.example: She laid the baby on the bed.

leadership.example: Good leadership helps a team succeed.
leadership.example_zh: 好的領導能幫助團隊成功。

leaf.example: A yellow leaf fell from the tree.

legal.example: It is legal to drive at eighteen here.
legal.example_zh: 在這裡十八歲開車是合法的。

legal.example: She gave me some legal advice.
legal.example_zh: 她給了我一些法律上的建議。

lend.example: Can you lend me your umbrella?

length.example: The length of the rope is two meters.

liberal.example: He has liberal views on many topics.
liberal.example_zh: 他對許多議題持開明的看法。

lid.example: Please put the lid on the pot.

lift.example: He lifted the heavy box easily.
lift.example_zh: 他輕鬆地舉起那個重箱子。

lift.example: Can you give me a lift to school?

likely.example: It is likely to rain this afternoon.
likely.example_zh: 今天下午很可能會下雨。

limit.example: There is a speed limit on this road.
Please limit your answer to one minute.
limit.example_zh: 請把回答限制在一分鐘內。

link.example: Click the link to open the page.
The bridge links the two towns.

liquid.example: Liquid soap is easy to use.

load.example: The workers loaded the boxes onto the truck.
The truck carried a heavy load.

local.example: We ate at a local restaurant.
local.example_zh: 我們在一家當地的餐廳吃飯。

lone.example: A lone tree stood on the hill.
lone.example_zh: 山丘上孤零零地立著一棵樹。

loss.example: The team's loss made the fans sad.
loss.example_zh: 球隊的失利讓球迷難過。

loss.example: The shop made a big loss this year.

lower.example: Please lower your voice in the library.

luck.example: Good luck on your test tomorrow!

maintain.example: It is important to maintain good health.

male.example: A male peacock has colorful feathers.
male.example_zh: 雄孔雀有色彩鮮豔的羽毛。

male.example: Most of the staff are male.

manage.example: He managed to finish the work on time.
manage.example_zh: 他設法準時完成了工作。

manager.example: The manager solved the problem quickly.

manner.example: He spoke in a polite manner.
It is good manners to say thank you.
manner.example_zh: 說謝謝是有禮貌的表現。

marriage.example: Their marriage has lasted thirty years.
marriage.example_zh: 他們的婚姻已維持三十年。

marry.example: She will marry her boyfriend next year.

mask.example: He wore a mask to the party.
She masked her sadness with a smile.

mass.example: A mass of people filled the street.
Television is a form of mass media.

master.example: It takes years to master the piano.
master.example_zh: 精通鋼琴要花上許多年。

master.example: He is a master of cooking.

mat.example: Wipe your feet on the mat.

match.example_zh: 我們看了一場網球比賽。

match.example: He lit the candle with a match.

material.example: She collected material for her report.

mature.example: She is very mature for her age.
mature.example_zh: 以她的年紀來說很成熟。

meaning.example: What is the meaning of this word?

means.example: A bicycle is a cheap means of travel.
means.example_zh: 腳踏車是便宜的交通方式。

measure.example: Use a ruler to measure the line.
The school took measures to keep students safe.
measure.example_zh: 學校採取措施保護學生安全。

medical.example: He needs medical help right away.

melody.example: The song has a beautiful melody.

membership.example: My gym membership ends next month.
membership.example_zh: 我的健身房會員下個月到期。

memory.example: She has a good memory for names.
I have happy memories of my childhood.
